song_name: Madilyn Bailey - Titanium - Taylor Swift - Shake It Off
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch]
You shout it out[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Cm[/ch]             [ch]Ab[/ch]
But I can't hear a word you say[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]              [ch]Cm[/ch]  [ch]Ab[/ch]
I'm talking loud not saying much[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]           [ch]Cm[/ch]                [ch]Ab[/ch]
I'm criticized but all your bullets ricochet[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]              [ch]Cm[/ch]
You shoot me down, but I get up[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]             [ch]Eb[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]Cm[/ch]
And I keep cruisin, can’t stop, won’t stop movin[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]                   [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]
It’s like I got this music in my mind sayin[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Cm[/ch]         [ch]Ab[/ch]
“It’s gonna be alright”[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]          [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch]
Cuz the players gonna play, play, play, play, play[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Cm[/ch]                    [ch]Ab[/ch]
And the haters gonna hate, hate, hate, hate, hate[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Eb[/ch]                             [ch]Bb[/ch]
Baby, I’m just gonna shake, shake, shake, shake, shake,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]                    [ch]Ab[/ch]
Shake it off, shake it off, whoa-oh-oh[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab]                [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch]
I never miss a beat[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Cm[/ch]             [ch]Ab[/ch]
I’m lightnin on my feet[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Eb[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]
That’s what they don’t see mm-mm[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Cm[/ch]   [ch]Ab[/ch]
That’s what they don’t see mm-mm[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch]
I’m dancin on my own[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Cm[/ch]             [ch]Ab[/ch]
Makin the moves up as I go[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Eb[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]
That’s what they don’t know mm-mm[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Cm[/ch]   [ch]Ab[/ch]
That’s what they don’t know mm-mm[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]        [ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]Eb[/ch]
I'm bulletproof, nothing to lose[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]Cm[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Ab[/ch]
Fire away, fire away[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                       [ch]Eb[/ch]
Ricochet, you take your aim[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Cm[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Ab[/ch]
Fire away, fire away[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch]                [ch]Eb[/ch]
You shoot me down but I won't fall[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]     [ch]Cm[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]
I am titanium[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]Eb[/ch]
You shoot me down but I won't fall[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Ab[/ch]
I am titanium[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]
Stone-hard, machine gun[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                    [ch]Bb[/ch]
Fired at the ones who run[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]        [ch]Bb[/ch]          [ch]Gm[/ch]    [ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]
Stone-hard as bulletproof glass[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]            [ch]Eb[/ch]
You shoot me down but I won't fall[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Eb[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Ab[/ch]
I am titanium[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]Eb[/ch]
You shoot me down but I won't fall[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Cm[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]
I am titanium[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]Eb[/ch]
I shake it off, shake it off, I-I-I[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch]              [ch]Eb[/ch]
Shake it off, I shake it off I-I[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Cm[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Ab[/ch]
Shake it off, Whoa-oh-oh-oh[/tab]
